payload.answer: This looks like a transient weather observation rather than a durable personal memory. I can help decide what to do with it.
repair_options: Do not save this as a durable memory.
Save only if you want Brain to remember weather context for a specific event or location.
Clarify the location and reason this weather note should be remembered.
